parameters.content:
## Customer Support Email Triage
### Sovereign AI — IONOS AI Model Hub

**What this workflow does:**
-  Watches the inbox for new unread emails
- Filters to only process emails addressed to support@ or info@
- Uses IONOS Sovereign AI (Llama 3.3-70B) to classify each email AND write a draft reply
- Categories: **Spam · Sales Lead · Tech Support · FAQ · Billing · Other**
- Creates a Gmail **Draft**
- Spam emails are silently marked as read (no draft created)

**Setup checklist:**
- [ ] Gmail OAuth2 credentials configured (for support@ or info@)
- [ ] IONOS Cloud API token added to credentials (ionosCloudApi)
- [ ] `@ionos-cloud/n8n-nodes-ionos-cloud` node package installed
- [ ] Update the Filter node with your actual domain (e.g. support@yourcompany.com)

**Data flow:**
Gmail Trigger → Filter (support@/info@ only) → Clean Email → AI Triage & Draft → Parse → Route → Draft / Archive Spam

parameters.text:
=You are an expert customer support triage assistant for a technology company.
Analyze the email below and return ONLY a valid JSON object — no markdown, no code fences, no explanation.

CATEGORIES (pick exactly one):
- "Spam"        : unsolicited commercial mail, phishing, bot-generated or clearly irrelevant
- "Sales Lead"  : pricing/demo inquiries, partnership proposals, purchase intent
- "Tech Support": technical problems, bugs, errors, product malfunctions, integration issues
- "FAQ"         : common how-to or product-info questions answered in standard documentation
- "Billing"     : payment issues, invoice requests, refunds, subscription changes
- "Other"       : legitimate emails that don't fit the above

PRIORITY (pick one):
- "Urgent" : system down, data loss, legal/compliance threat, or very angry customer
- "High"   : customer is frustrated or has a time-sensitive issue
- "Medium" : normal business inquiry
- "Low"    : informational, no urgency

DRAFT REPLY RULES:
- Write the reply in the SAME language as the email
- Open with a personalized greeting using the sender first name when available
- Acknowledge their specific situation concisely
- Provide helpful next steps or a resolution path
- Close professionally; use [YOUR NAME] as the signature placeholder
- If category is "Spam", set draft_reply to the string "N/A"

Return exactly this JSON structure:
{
  "category": "...",
  "priority": "...",
  "summary": "one sentence describing the email",
  "sentiment": "Positive | Neutral | Frustrated | Angry",
  "language": "detected language name in English (e.g. French, German, English)",
  "draft_reply": "complete reply text ready to review and send"
}

EMAIL:
From: {{ $json.fromName }} <{{ $json.from }}>
To: {{ $json.toAddress }}
Subject: {{ $json.subject }}
Date: {{ $json.date }}
Body:
{{ $json.cleanBody }}

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $json.subject }}

parameters.content:
## 1. Receive & Filter Email

Polls Gmail every minute for new unread messages.

**Filter node:** only lets through emails where the `from` field contains `support@` or `info@`. All other emails are silently ignored.

> ✏️ Update the Filter node values with your full addresses (e.g. `support@yourcompany.com`) for a stricter match.

## 2. AI Triage + Draft Reply
### IONOS AI Model Hub (Llama 3.3-70B)

Single AI call returns structured JSON:
- **category** (Spam / Sales Lead / Tech Support / FAQ / Billing / Other)
- **priority** (Low / Medium / High / Urgent)
- **summary** (one-sentence description)
- **sentiment** (Positive / Neutral / Frustrated / Angry)
- **language** (auto-detected)
- **draft_reply** (complete reply, same language as email)
